Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x6000 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Harrier Attack.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0b80 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $0b00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Harrier Attack.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $0B00 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
